income_gate: Leads and published packets are not income until payout, prize, credit, refund, or other usable value is verified.
status_summary: Latest: current no-spend and direct-paid shortlist now centers on Backblaze Generative Media Hackathon, CrowdGen by Appen's U.S. Video Collector lane, Appen's U.S. linguistics lane, Anthropic Fellows Program, H0, Protegrity, Slack Agent Builder Challenge, Galuxium Nexus V2, Qwen Cloud, OpenAI for Startups, OpenAI Researcher Access Program, OpenAI Economic Research Exchange, Google Cloud AI startup credits, ElevenLabs Startup Grants, the user-testing lanes, and a Silent Infotech direct buyer packet; no income or usable value verified yet.

promoted_hits.value_signal: $10,000 cash prizes, 10 GB of free Backblaze B2 storage to start, and GMI Cloud credits for the first 270 eligible participants.
promoted_hits.eligibility_or_region_notes: Official blog describes an online competition for developers building generative media apps; check the linked hackathon page for any final eligibility restrictions before any submission work.
promoted_hits.deadline_or_currentness: Registration and submissions run June 22 through August 3, 2026 (5 pm ET); winners are announced August 12.
promoted_hits.evidence_gate: Submission receipt plus later judging, verification, and prize or usable-credit delivery proof.
promoted_hits.ai_can_do_next: Draft a small media pipeline that turns public AI Monkey proof assets into a demo reel, image set, or provenance-aware generation workflow.
promoted_hits.human_must_do_next: Human account owner must confirm fit, register if eligible, and submit the project through the official hackathon flow.
promoted_hits.automation_boundary: No login, submission, account creation, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, wallet, or private data handling.
promoted_hits.why_this_is_not_income_yet: The prize pool and storage credits are real, but no submission, ranking, verification, or payout has been confirmed.
promoted_hits.risk_flags: The build needs a genuine generative-media fit; do not route if the project would be a thin wrapper.
promoted_hits.known_blockers: Need a truthful media workflow that can be demonstrated before the August 3 deadline.
